title: Grimoire · Character Relationships
description: Extraction schema for character-relationships.md. Fields map to **Label:** fill-ins, tables, and checkbox groups in the template. Mark fields with x-source-required: true when the value should cite a source passage.

_source_text.description: Metadata about the source text being analyzed (fill in when using this template for book analysis).

how_long_have_they_known_each_other.description: How long have they known each other?

have_they_hurt_each_other_before.description: Have they hurt each other before?

what_does_character_a_want_from_characte.description: What does Character A want from Character B?

what_does_character_b_want_from_characte.description: What does Character B want from Character A?

what_prevents_them_from_getting_what_the.description: What prevents them from getting what they want?

how_does_character_a_feel_about_characte.description: How does Character A feel about Character B?

how_does_character_b_feel_about_characte.description: How does Character B feel about Character A?

how_do_they_reconcile_if_they_do.description: How do they reconcile (if they do)?

what_power_does_a_hold_over_b.description: What power does A hold over B?

what_power_does_b_hold_over_a.description: What power does B hold over A?

what_would_happen_if_the_power_balance_s.description: What would happen if the power balance shifted?

how_does_this_relationship_challenge_cha.description: How does this relationship challenge Character A's arc?
How does this relationship challenge Character B's arc?

what_plot_event_will_force_change_in_thi.description: What plot event will force change in this relationship?

what_does_this_relationship_represent_th.description: What does this relationship represent thematically?

what_question_does_this_relationship_ask.description: What question does this relationship ask?

what_answer_does_your_story_offer_throug.description: What answer does your story offer through this relationship's arc?

relationship_rows.description: Table with columns: Relationship, Power Balance, Current State, Primary Conflict, Arc Direction

enum: Does every major character have at least one meaningful relationship?
Are there both supportive and antagonistic relationships for protagonist?
Do relationships create conflict, not just exist passively?
Is there variety (not all relationships follow same pattern)?
Do relationships have history that informs present behavior?
Can I track how each key relationship changes over the story?
Do any relationships feel thin or stereotypical? (Fix them.)
Do relationships serve theme as well as plot?
